texto: Prayer will carry you to Judgment Day
autor: it is your nourishment and your protection. In prayer you are closest to God. It is then that you develop your own personal relationship with God.
explicacao: Citação de it is your nourishment and your protection. In prayer you are closest to God. It is then that you develop your own personal relationship with God. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Prayer will carry you to Judgment Day” articula reflexao, kristiane-backer, prayer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
